text: Trump says Iran talks striking Iran's power plants for 5 days during 'productive conversations' - NPR

text: Leonid Radvinsky, Controversial Owner Of OnlyFans, Dies At 43 - Forbes
fullText: Radvinsky, a Ukrainian-born U.S. citizen, purchased OnlyFans in 2018 and was estimated to be worth $4.7 billion at the time of his death, though he first made millions operating shady and spammy porn websites that he built as a teenager.

text: J. Michael Bishop, who illuminated genetic roots of cancer, dies at 90 - The Washington Post
fullText: Dr. Bishop shared a Nobel Prize with Harold Varmus for his work on cancer-causing genes called oncogenes. He later served as chancellor of UC San Francisco.
